site.name: Alex Morgan
site.description: Alex Morgan is a photographer based in New York, USA.

about.text:
b. 1990, Chicago, USA
Lives and works in New York, USA.

Alex Morgan is a documentary photographer whose work explores urban landscapes and the people who inhabit them.

Represented by Example Gallery, New York.
